missions.title: Laws of Motion - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering force, inertia, Newton’s first law and more.

microtargets.title: Force
mustKnowFacts: Force is a fundamental subtopic of Laws of Motion.
Crucial to understand the principles governing Force for NEET.
commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Force during complex MCQs.
Failing to apply the correct logic for Force.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify structures related to Force.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about Force.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain the core concept behind Force.
What is a common trap associated with Force?
